doc_name: Contraline Secures $92.5M to Push Its Male Birth Control Candidates Forward

chunks.text: Contraline raised $92.5 million in new funding to advance its two male contraceptive candidates, including a once-daily topical gel and an implantable option. The post Contraline Secures $92.5M to Push Its Male Birth Control Candidates Forward appeared first on MedCity News.
chunks.doc_name: Contraline Secures $92.5M to Push Its Male Birth Control Candidates Forward
